name: Generative Ontology Induction: Domain-Agnostic Schema Discovery from Document Corpora Using Large Language Models

description: arXiv:2607.16201v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Ontology engineering remains a critical bottleneck in knowledge-intensive AI systems. Existing automated approaches either depend on predefined schemas, operate within narrow domains, or produce unstructured outputs unsuitable for downstream pipelines. We introduce Generative Ontology Induction (GOI), a domain-agnostic framework that induces a gen...
author: Sergei Sergienko
